project.name: Knowledge Hub
project.description: Internal memory and handoff service for AI-assisted work sessions.
project.current_goal: Move from internal alpha toward calmer production deploy readiness with strong automation.
project.rules: Prefer automation over manual entry. Keep the system simple, reliable, and ready for future multi-user growth.

focus.recommended_next_step: Use the new env status page to drive one real Render env setup pass and then verify SMTP delivery against the live deployment.
active_blockers: Real Render values are still missing for public base URL, SMTP host, owner email, and secret key
Production SMTP is still not verified end-to-end against the live service
Real Render env values still need to be set for public base URL, SMTP, owner email, and secret key
There is still no verified production SMTP provider configured against the live service
Render production still needs real SMTP before KH_AUTH_REQUIRED can be enabled safely
Owner email and secret key are still placeholder values in the current local baseline
A real SMTP provider is still not configured in production env vars
Render still uses placeholder mail sender and owner settings

latest_snapshot.title: Current internal state
latest_snapshot.content: Knowledge Hub now has project packages, automation events, inbox watcher status, backup archives, and copy-friendly handoff pages.

recent_session_notes.task: Add a production env status page for Render-facing configuration
recent_session_notes.summary: Knowledge Hub now shows a dedicated deploy env status page, API, and CLI so missing, default, or blocking production env variables are obvious before the first live deploy.
recent_session_notes.next_step: Use the new env status page to drive one real Render env setup pass and then verify SMTP delivery against the live deployment.

recent_session_notes.task: Add public-base-url handling and a Render deploy setup guide
recent_session_notes.summary: Knowledge Hub now supports KH_PUBLIC_BASE_URL for stable magic-link URLs and ships a copy-friendly deploy setup guide with phased Render env values for SMTP first and auth-required second.
recent_session_notes.next_step: Add one production env status page that makes the remaining real Render values impossible to miss before the first live deploy.

recent_session_notes.task: Add auth-required private mode on top of magic-link login
recent_session_notes.summary: Knowledge Hub can now require sign-in for private pages and APIs, preserve next targets after magic-link login, and warn if production auth is enabled without real mail delivery.
recent_session_notes.next_step: Prepare the first provider-ready Render email setup path and tighten the deploy checklist around real production env values.

recent_session_notes.task: Add the first real SMTP delivery path for magic-link login
recent_session_notes.summary: Knowledge Hub now supports SMTP delivery, SMTP readiness checks, and a safe test-email CLI without removing the file outbox fallback.
recent_session_notes.next_step: Configure a real SMTP provider on Render and verify one real magic-link delivery end-to-end.

selected_prompt_template.title: Continue Knowledge Hub work
selected_prompt_template.content: Read the ready-for-next-chat handoff first, do not ask to restate context, and focus on the next production-safe improvement.
